name: Spicy Beef Pitas
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Thinly sliced cooked roast beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Place thinly sliced cooked roast beef in a plastic bag set inside a bowl.
2. In a medium bowl, combine picante sauce, red-wine vinegar, olive oil, cilantro, garlic powder, and cracked black pepper to make the marinade.
3. Pour the marinade over the beef, seal the bag, and marinate in the refrigerator for 4-24 hours, turning the bag occasionally.
4. To serve, drain and discard the marinade.
5. Fill each pita half with beef.
6. Top with chopped vegetables (tomato, avocado, green pepper) and feta cheese.
